name: I Want to Resign Every Single Day
overview: Bai Jing resigns from her position as secretary to President Jin Shi’an due to dissatisfaction with her work arrangement, only to unexpectedly find herself trapped in a time loop. As she navigates the loop with their growing connection, they work together to resolve a company crisis.
